caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair pulled back is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black t-shirt and black headphones. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. To her left is a screen displaying the word "ohnson" in red text, and above the screen is a sign that reads "Employees Only". Throughout the clip, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing as she talks. Red and white logos and text are overlaid on the scene, including "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". A small graphic beneath the main logo reads "By 11 Logo Studio". The background consists of a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe. The camera remains stationary as the woman continues her conversation, focusing on her upper body and the recording equipment.
